settings.faq_answer: Vera is a lightly sparkling productive elixir made from Vinifera red grapes and enhanced with science-backed adaptogens and nootropics. It's designed to support mood, focus, and balanced energy—without alcohol, stimulants, or excess sugar.
No. Vera doesn’t rely on caffeine or stimulants. Instead, it supports calm, sustained energy by helping your body manage stress, maintain focus, and function efficiently.
Anytime you want to feel good and stay clear-headed—during focused work, creative flow, social moments, or as a daily wellness ritual.
It’s our way of describing a drink that supports mood, focus, and clarity — without overstimulation. Productive doesn’t mean wired; it means present, calm, and engaged.

settings.faq_question: What makes Vera different from other functional beverages?
settings.faq_answer: Vera starts with a grape-first foundation. Vinifera red grapes provide naturally occurring antioxidants and polyphenols, which we enhance with adaptogens and nootropics. Most functional drinks begin with water or stimulants — Vera begins with real fruit.
Vera is naturally flavored and lightly sweetened to highlight by the fruit itself with no added sugar. It contains only 45 calories per can.

settings.faq_question: Are the ingredients in Vera safe?
settings.faq_answer: As with any functional ingredient, please consult your healthcare professional before consuming this product, especially if you are pregnant, nursing, have a medical condition, or are taking any medications that might interact with the ingredients.

settings.faq_question: Can I drink more than one can per day?
settings.faq_answer: Yes. Vera is designed to be enjoyed daily. As with any functional beverage, we recommend listening to your body and consuming responsibly.

settings.faq_question: Will Vera make me feel jittery or crash later?
settings.faq_answer: No. Vera is formulated to support calm focus and clarity not spikes or crashes.
No. Vera is a functional beverage, not a supplement. It’s designed to complement a healthy lifestyle—not replace medical advice or nutrition.
Vera is available online and in select retailers. Visit our Product page to see current availability.
Store unopened cans at room temperature. Chill before serving for best taste.
Vera is produced in accordance with FDA food and beverage regulations. Like all functional foods, ingredient benefits are described in supportive, non-medical terms.

settings.faq_question: I have a question that’s not answered here.
settings.faq_answer: We’d love to hear from you! Just visit our Contact Page.

settings.title: ReSET your routine.
settings.content: Thoughtfully crafted with real vinifera red grapes for a refresh that fits seamlessly into your day.
